{{Infobox character
| name = Nera Jesh
| aliases = Nera
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = military cadet
| abilities = fire elementalism, fire mage
| affiliations = Lichborn
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Nera Jesh, also known as Nera, is a young [[Lichborn woman]] and fire elementalist. She possesses green eyes characteristic of her kind and has hair that is tied up. Her origins are linked to [[Dornoth]] II or a neighboring colony. As an elementalist, she has demonstrated the ability to conjure intense green flames, which she has used to etch runes into structures. Throughout her travels, she has expressed hesitation and concern regarding certain missions, including questions about attacking the [[Galactic Union]] or potential harm to others. She has also shown a desire to protect her family and has expressed curiosity regarding various cosmic phenomena and technologies.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Nera Jesh]] is a [[Lichborn]] military cadet and fire elementalist.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Nera Jesh is a young [[Lichborn woman]] originally born on [[Dornoth]] II or one of its neighboring colonies. Distinguished by her green eyes, she is a specialist in the art of fire [[elementalism]]. As a practitioner of fire magic, she utilizes her unique abilities as a [[Lichborn]] mage.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nera Jesh]] is a [[Lichborn woman]] who specializes in fire [[elementalism]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9">''The Pilot'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Nera has green [[Lichborn]] eyes.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Nera was born on [[Dornoth]] II or a nearby colony.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nera Jesh]] is a fire mage.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nera Jesh]] is a young [[Lichborn woman]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31">''The Pilot'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|I pointed at another young woman, a Lichborn military cadet who was only here remotely. “Nera Jesh, fire elementalist.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Mages]]
